title: Mysore Heat Wave
lead: Mysore is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Mysore are extremely hot and dry, with a relative humidity of 64% and a wind speed of 9.0 km/h.
The heat wave has resulted in a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.5 GG, indicating a significant increase in energy demand.
The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense pressure due to the prolonged heat wave, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
